headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love TransDigm (TDG)
summary: Since December 2025, TransDigm has been in a holding pattern, posting a small return of 1.7% while floating around $1,338. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 6.8% gain during that period.

headline: Mercury Systems (MRCY) Surges 3.6%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Mercury Systems (MRCY) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
